text: Consistent sleep and wake times, dim screens before bed, and a cool dark room support mood regulation.
Try 4-7-8 breathing: inhale 4 seconds, hold 7, exhale 8, repeated a few cycles to calm the nervous system.
Grounding 5-4-3-2-1: notice five things you see, four you feel, three you hear, two you smell, one you taste.
Small scheduled pleasant activities, even brief walks or listening to music, can improve motivation over time.
If symptoms persist or worsen, consider speaking with a licensed clinician or your doctor for personalized care.
